name: axle
title: axle — Accessibility Scanner
description: Scan any URL for WCAG 2.1 / 2.2 AA accessibility violations without leaving Raycast. Results appear as a list; pick any violation to see the offending element and suggested fix.
author: asafamos

commands.name: scan
commands.title: Scan URL for Accessibility
commands.subtitle: axle
commands.description: Run an axe-core scan against any public URL and show violations.

commands.name: statement
commands.title: Open Hebrew Accessibility Statement Generator
commands.subtitle: axle
commands.description: Opens the free Hebrew statement generator — aligned with Israeli תקנה 35.
